title: 'extern C' should be avoided with namespaces
description: 'extern "C"' should not be used with namespacesAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalmaintainabilityCode SmellconfusingWhy is this an issue?The C linkage declarationextern "C"can not be combined with a namespace. In practical terms only one function with that name can be declared asextern "C"because thenamespaceis functionally ignored.Noncompliant code examplenamespace ns1 { extern "C" void doSomething(); // Noncompliant // ... } extern "C" { namespace ns2 { // Noncompliant // ..
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: 'extern C' should be avoided with namespaces - found extern "C" declaration conflicting with namespace
